response.overview: YUM YUM PUMPKINS...  In the wake of her mother’s death, young Esme finds herself trapped in a world of isolation, her vibrant spirit dimmed by her father’s emotional distance. Longing for connection, she stumbles upon a mysterious, otherworldly creature , who becomes her unlikely companion. As Esme’s scientific curiosity pulls her deeper into the creature’s enigmatic world, she begins to discover secrets that hint at a dangerous truth about the Freakee that challenge the very fabric of reality.
response.title: The Freakees
